items.summary: Cover page for Goethe-Zertifikat A1 Start Deutsch 1 practice set.
Publisher imprint and copyright details.
Title page and table of contents for the exam set.
Blank divider page with logo only.
Foreword describing the A1 exam and its skill areas.
Blank page with logo only.
Listening section intro and general test instructions.
Listening Part 1 instructions with worked example about room numbers.
Listening questions 1-3 on party location, meeting time, taxis.
Listening questions 4-6 on courses, food to bring, return date.
Listening Part 2 true/false announcements, questions 7-10.
Listening Part 3 questions 11-13 on forms, meeting places, times.
Listening questions 14-15 on giving info and commuting to work.
Blank page with logo only.
Reading and Writing section intro and instructions.
Reading Part 1 true/false on a letter about a jazz concert.
Reading true/false on an email about a work schedule, questions 3-5.
Reading Part 2 matching ads, example weather plus question 6 venue.
Reading Part 2 matching ads for computer repair and dancing, 7-8.
Reading Part 2 matching ads for football and student jobs, 9-10.
Reading Part 3 true/false on signs, example plus flower shop, 11.
Reading true/false on restaurant and tram notices, questions 12-13.
Reading true/false on apartment and station notices, questions 14-15.
Writing Part 1 filling a patient form with five missing details.
Writing Part 2 prompt to email a colleague about a birthday party.
Blank page with logo only.
Speaking section intro and general instructions.
Speaking Part 1 self-introduction prompts: name, age, country, job.
Speaking Part 2 cards on work theme: hours, colleagues, clothing.
Speaking Part 2 cards on sport theme: swimming, weekend, bike.
Speaking Part 3 picture cards: post office, taxi, key, receipt.
Speaking Part 3 picture cards: toiletries, coins, calendar, station.
Examiner sheets table of contents.
Listening transcripts for Part 1 example and items 1-3.
Listening transcripts for items 4-6.
Listening transcripts Part 2 announcements, items 7-10.
Listening transcripts Part 3 phone messages, items 11-15.
Answer key for Listening, Reading, and Writing sections.
Writing assessment criteria and scoring scale.
Sample writing answers with scores for the email task.
Oral exam guidance and Part 1 self-introduction script.
Oral exam scripts for Parts 1 and 2 procedures.
Oral exam Part 3 guidance on formulating requests.
Speaking assessment criteria and scoring scale.
Answer sheet for Listening, Reading, and Writing sections.
Answer sheet page 2 for Writing Part 2 text and scoring.
Back cover with publisher, ISBN, and material number.
